# AgentCube — Implementation Plan (AR-034 through AR-043)

## Overview

This plan covers Architectural Requirements AR-034 through AR-043, building upon the foundation established by AR-001 through AR-033. These ARs focus on specific implementation details, edge cases, and extended functionality for each component.

## AR Mapping to Specs

| AR | Spec Directory | Primary Function |
|----|---------------|-----------------|
| AR-034 | `ci-cd/` | E2E test setup details, Kind cluster config, artifact collection |
| AR-035 | `cli-toolkit/` | CLI error handling, metadata validation, Docker/K8s integration details |
| AR-036 | `code-execution/` | PicoD JWT auth, file operations, workspace security |
| AR-037 | `deployment/` | Helm chart templates, CRDs, RBAC, Docker build args |
| AR-038 | `idle-cleanup/` | agentd reconciler, annotation parsing, deletion logic |
| AR-039 | `integrations/` | Dify plugin, PCAP analyzer FastAPI integration |
| AR-040 | `python-sdk/` | SDK clients, HTTP transport, session management |
| AR-041 | `sandbox-orchestration/` | CRD types, workload manager handlers, GC |
| AR-042 | `session-routing/` | Router proxy, JWT injection, health endpoints |
| AR-043 | `session-store/` | Redis/Valkey providers, atomic operations, indexing |

21: type Reconciler struct {
22: 	client.Client
23: 	Scheme   *runtime.Scheme
24: 	watchers map[string]chan struct{}
25: }
26: 
27: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
28: 	log := log.FromContext(ctx)
29: 	log.Info("Reconciling Sandbox")
30: 
31: 	sandbox := &v1alpha1.Sandbox{}
32: 	if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {
33: 		if apiErrors.IsNotFound(err) {
34: 			log.Info("Sandbox not found, skipping")
35: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
36: 		}
37: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to get Sandbox")
38: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	annotations := sandbox.GetAnnotations()
42: 	if annotations == nil {
43: 		log.Info("No annotations found on Sandbox, skipping")
44: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	lastActivityStr, exists := annotations[agentcube.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
48: 	if !exists || lastActivityStr == "" {
49: 		log.Info("No last activity annotation found, skipping")
50: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
54: 	if err != nil {
55: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to parse last activity timestamp, requeueing")
56: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, nil
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(15 * time.Minute)
60: 
61: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
62: 		log.Info("Sandbox expired, deleting", "expirationTime", expirationTime)
63: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
64: 			if apiErrors.IsNotFound(err) {
65: 				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
66: 			}
67: 			log.Error(err, "Failed to delete Sandbox")
68: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
69: 		}
70: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	log.Info("Sandbox not expired, requeueing", "expirationTime", expirationTime)
74: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
75: }

27: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {

29: 	log.Info("Reconciling Sandbox")
30: 
31: 	sandbox := &v1alpha1.Sandbox{}
32: 	if err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox); err != nil {

34: 			log.Info("Sandbox not found, skipping")
35: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
36: 		}
37: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to get Sandbox")
38: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
39: 	}
40: 
41: 	annotations := sandbox.GetAnnotations()
42: 	if annotations == nil {
43: 		log.Info("No annotations found on Sandbox, skipping")
44: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	lastActivityStr, exists := annotations[agentcube.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
48: 	if !exists || lastActivityStr == "" {
49: 		log.Info("No last activity annotation found, skipping")
50: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
51: 	}
52: 
53: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, lastActivityStr)
54: 	if err != nil {
55: 		log.Error(err, "Failed to parse last activity timestamp, requeueing")
56: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, nil
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(15 * time.Minute)
60: 
61: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
62: 		log.Info("Sandbox expired, deleting", "expirationTime", expirationTime)
63: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
64: 			if apiErrors.IsNotFound(err) {

66: 			}

68: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
69: 		}

71: 	}

73: 	log.Info("Sandbox not expired, requeueing", "expirationTime", expirationTime)
74: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
75: }

15: package agentd
16: 
17: import (
18: 	"context"
19: 	"time"
20: 
21: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/errors"
22: 	"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/runtime"
23: 	ctrl "sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime"
24: 	"sigs.k8s.io/controller-runtime/pkg/client"
25: 
26: 	sandboxv1alpha1 "sigs.k8s.io/agent-sandbox/api/v1alpha1"
27: 
28: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/workloadmanager"
29: )
30: 
31: const SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
32: 
33: type Reconciler struct {
34: 	client.Client
35: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
36: }
37: 
38: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
39: 	logger := ctrl.LoggerFrom(ctx)
40: 
41: 	sandbox := &sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}
42: 	err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
43: 	if err != nil {
44: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
45: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
46: 		}
47: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	annotationValue, exists := sandbox.Annotations[workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
51: 	if !exists || annotationValue == "" {
52: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
53: 	}
54: 
55: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, annotationValue)
56: 	if err != nil {
57: 		logger.Error(err, "failed to parse last activity annotation", "value", annotationValue)
58: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, nil
59: 	}
60: 
61: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
62: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
63: 		logger.Info("deleting expired sandbox", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
64: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
65: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
66: 				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
67: 			}
68: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
69: 		}
70: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
74: }
75: 
76: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
77: 	return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
78: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
79: 		Complete(r)
80: }

25:

27: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/workloadmanager"
28: )
29: 
30: const SessionExpirationTimeout = 15 * time.Minute
31: 
32: type Reconciler struct {
33: 	client.Client
34: 	Scheme *runtime.Scheme
35: }
36: 
37: func (r *Reconciler) Reconcile(ctx context.Context, req ctrl.Request) (ctrl.Result, error) {
38: 	logger := ctrl.LoggerFrom(ctx)
39: 
40: 	sandbox := &v1alpha1.Sandbox{}
41: 	err := r.Get(ctx, req.NamespacedName, sandbox)
42: 	if err != nil {
43: 		if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
44: 			return ctrl.Result{}, nil
45: 		}
46: 		return ctrl.Result{}, err
47: 	}
48: 
49: 	annotationValue, exists := sandbox.Annotations[workloadmanager.LastActivityAnnotationKey]
50: 	if !exists || annotationValue == "" {
51: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
52: 	}
53: 
54: 	lastActivity, err := time.Parse(time.RFC3339, annotationValue)
55: 	if err != nil {
56: 		logger.Error(err, "failed to parse last activity annotation", "value", annotationValue)
57: 		return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: 30 * time.Second}, nil
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	expirationTime := lastActivity.Add(SessionExpirationTimeout)
61: 	if time.Now().After(expirationTime) {
62: 		logger.Info("deleting expired sandbox", "name", req.Name, "namespace", req.Namespace)
63: 		if err := r.Delete(ctx, sandbox); err != nil {
64: 			if errors.IsNotFound(err) {
65: 				return ctrl.Result{}, nil
66: 			}
67: 			return ctrl.Result{}, err
68: 		}
69: 		return ctrl.Result{}, nil
70: 	}
71: 
72: 	return ctrl.Result{RequeueAfter: time.Until(expirationTime)}, nil
73: }

75: func (r *Reconciler) SetupWithManager(mgr ctrl.Manager) error {
76: 	return ctrl.NewControllerManagedBy(mgr).
77: 		For(&sandboxv1alpha1.Sandbox{}).
78: 		Complete(r)
79: }
